TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_alup, title = alup, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/alup} }

S.FORM: alup alup ga mhuqil lga, mkbka' yulaq nya' ru cingay qpuri' nya'.
alup alup ga mhuqil lga, mkbka' yulaq nya' ru cingay qpuri' nya'.
S.PHON: alup alup ɣa mħuqil lɣa, mkβkaʔ julaq njaʔ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj qpuriʔ njaʔ.
